parameters.query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.profile->>'age' as age, u.profile->>'goal' as goal, u.profile->>'activity_level' as activity_level, COUNT(m.id) as meal_count_today FROM users u LEFT JOIN meals m ON u.id = m.user_id AND DATE(m.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE WHERE u.email IS NOT NULL AND u.email != '' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.name, u.profile->>'age', u.profile->>'goal', u.profile->>'activity_level'

parameters.columns: user_id, email, subject, sent_at, status, meal_count_today
